verses.text: Ahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmleguk sung uk hi. A pu David gamtat hoih bangin Topa' mitah a man gamtalo a
Israel kumpite' khekhap zuizaw hi. Amah in a kisung milimte nangawn Baal-te-a' dingin a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Hinnom' tapa' kuamah paknamtui hal a, Topa in Israel-te' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minamte in a zat uh a kihhuai gamtatnate mah bangin biakna-in a tapate a hal hi
Tua ciangin amah in mual dawna biakpiaknate, leh mual neute, leh singniim nuai khempeuhah biakna pia-in paknamtui a hal hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Syria kumpipa khutsungah amah pia a, amah in zo-in mi tampi salin Damaskas-ah a ciahpih hi. Israel kumpipa' khutsungah zong amah kipia a, amah zo-in a mite tampi tak a that hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa nusia uh ahih manin Remaliah' tapa Pekah in nikhat thu-in amaute galhang mihing tul za khat leh tul sawmnih, Judah gam sungah a that hi
Tua ciangin Efraim mi a thahat Zikri in Kumpi Ahaz' tapa Maaseiah leh kumpi inn a uk Azrikam leh kumpipa zomah aana a nei Elkanah a that hi
Israel mite in amau' beh Judah mite lak panin numeite, tapate, leh tanute, mihing tul za nih salin a man uh hi. Amaute in amau' kiang panin van tampi zong la-in tua vante Samaria-ah a ciahpih uh hi

Ahih hangin Oded min nei Topa' kamsang khat tua lai-ah om hi. Samaria-ah hong tung galkapte a dawn dingin amah paikhia-in amaute kiangah, “En un, Judah tungah na pu na pate uh Pasian Topa heh ahih manin note' khutsungah amaute hong pia a, ahih hangin note in heh mahmahna tawh amaute na that uh a, tua in vantung dong ban hi
Tu-in note in Judah mi leh Jerusalem mi, numei leh pasalte, na sal dingun nuaisiah na sawm uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh tungah nomau mahmah in khialhna nei hilo na hi uh hiam
Tu-in ka thugen hong za un la, na behte uh kiang panin na lak uh na galmatte uh puakkik un; bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Topa' hehna a lauhuai om hi,” a ci hi
Efraim mi ukpite pawkhat, Johanan' tapa Azariah, Meshilemoth' tapa Berekhiah, Shallum' tapa Jehizkiah, leh Hadlai' tapa Amasa, galsung panin hong tungte' langkhatah pangin

amaute kiangah, “Tuhuna i khialhnate leh i mawhna behlapin Topa' tungah mawhna eite tungah behlap hong sawm na hih manun hih lai-ah galmatte nong tun'pih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh i mawhna lian khinzo a, Israel tungah a lauhuai hehna om hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin galhiam tawi mite in uliante leh a kikhawm khempeuh' mai-ah galmatte leh a lak uh nate nusia uh hi

Tua ciangin tua na a sem dingin mite dingin galmatte la uh a, amaute lakah guaktangin a omte, a vanlakte uh sung pan puante silhsak uh hi. Amaute puan silhsak uh a, khedap kaihte pia-in an leh tui vak uh a, sathau nilh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute lakah a tha ginalote la tungah pua uh a, nisuh khuapi ahi Jerikho khua amau' behte kiangah paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin Samaria-ah amaute ciahkik uh hi
Tua hun laitakin Kumpi Ahaz in Assiria kumpipa kiangah huhna a ngen dingin mi a sawl hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom mite in Judah simkikin zo uh a, galmatin a mite puakhia uh hi

Tua ciangin Filistia mite in Shefelah leh Judah-te' Negeb gamsung khuapite luh uh a, Bethshemesh, Aijalon, Gederoth, Soko a khuaneute tawh, Timnah a khuaneute tawh, leh Gimzo a khuaneute tawh la uh a, amaute tua munah teng uh hi
Judah Kumpi Ahaz pen Judah mite tungah kihihsakna tawh gamta-in Topa' tungah citaklo ahih manin ama hangin Topa in Judah mite niamkoih hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Ahaz' ngetna zui-in Assiria kumpipa Tilgathpileser hong kuan hi. Ahi zongin amah thakhauhsakzaw loin gimsakzaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Ahaz in Topa' biakinn, kumpipa' inn, leh uliante' inn panin vanmanphate la-in Assiria kumpipa tungah siah pia a, ahih hangin hihte khempeuh a kiman'na omlo hi
Hih Kumpi Ahaz mah pen, a lungkham hunin Topa' tungah citaklozaw lai hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a zo Damaskas-te' pasian-te tungah biakna pia-in, “Syria kumpite' pasian-te in amaute huh ahih manin amaute in kei hong huh theihna dingun amau' tungah biakna ka pia ding hi,” ci hi. Ahih hangin tua pasian-te pen amah leh a mipihte khempeuh' siatna ahi hi
Tua ciangin Ahaz in Pasian' biakinn-a umlebeelte khawmin satnen a, tua ciangin Topa' biakinn kongkhakte a kalhcip hi. Tua ciangin ama-a' dingin Jerusalem kiu khempeuhah biakna tau a bawl hi
Amah in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui halna dingin Judah khuapi khempeuhah mual dawna biakpiaknate bawl a, a pu a pate' Pasian, Topa a hehna dingin a phin hi
Tu-in ama gamtatna a omlaite leh a omzia khempeuh, a patna panin a tawpna dong, Judah leh Israel Kumpite' Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Ahaz si a, amaute in Jerusalem khuapi sungah vui uh a, ahi zongin Judah kumpite tawh vuikhawm lo uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Hezekiah in ama tangin a uk hi.
